creator: theoharis@cti.gr
text:
According to this http://permalink.gmane.org/gmane.comp.programming.swig.devel/21196
SWIG 2.0.4+ (SVN version) is patched to use correct pointer type...

When port devel/swig20  (2.0.4) will have been updated (e.x. to 2.0.7),
/usr/ports/graphics/graphviz/work/graphviz-2.28.0/tclpkg/gv/Makefile may use "SWIG = /usr/local/bin/swig2.0" at line 759.

I haven't tested it yet... :)
